title: ervum bijugum
intro: Ervum bijugum, also known as the two-leaved vetch or bird's foot vetch, is a leguminous plant species native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, Ervum bijugum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Ervum bijugum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
